error.example: An error occurred while registering the user.

get.description: Returns list of projects with status done

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: project status. Accepts: all, pending, ongoing, done.

error.example: Status not found. Try with pending, ongoing, done or all; or remove parameter from query.

post.description: Creates a new project with the provided data

get.description: Returns the details of specified project.

delete.description: Deletes project. Regular users can only remove their projects. Admin can remove any project.

get.description: Returns a list of all services.

post.description: Creates a new service with the provided data.

languages.description: Languages array. If type is 'proofreading', it must be a one-level array of language pairs. If type is 'translating', it must be an array of objects with 'source', 'target', and 'bidirectional' properties.

get.description: Returns the details of the specified service.

put.description: Updates the specified service with the provided data.

languages.description: Languages array. If type is 'proofreading', it must be a one-level array of language pairs. If type is 'translating', it must be an array of objects with 'source', 'target', and 'bidirectional' properties.

get.description: Returns list of id-email for users
Returns the details of current user. Only admin can see others.

delete.description: Deletes user. Regular users can only remove themselves. Admin can remove everyone except admins. Regular users must provide their password.

get.description: Returns all project details from current user. Only admin can see other's projects.
